questions.question: What is the length of an IPv6 address?
Explain the IPv6 datagram format and the different fields in the header.
Describe the different types of extension headers and their uses.
Compare and contrast IPv4 and IPv6 datagrams.
expectedPoints: IPv6 datagrams are larger than IPv4 datagrams
IPv6 datagrams have a longer header than IPv4 datagrams
IPv6 datagrams use a different address format than IPv4 datagrams

questions.question: Explain the purpose of the Flow Label field in the IPv6 header.
expectedPoints: To identify a flow of packets
